_comment: Example MCP client configuration for the P21 API Documentation Server
_comment2: Copy the relevant section to your client's config file

_streamable_http._description: For Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code, and other clients supporting Streamable HTTP

_claude_desktop_stdio_bridge._description: For Claude Desktop using the mcp-remote stdio bridge

_stdio_direct._description: Run the server directly via stdio (no HTTP)
